creator: xenophon+fbsdports@irtnog.org
text:
Created attachment 157011
gzipped shell archive containing port

This revives the devel/py-gitpython port and bumps the version to 1.0.1.  Previous PRs (e.g., 199335) reference older versions of the software.  I don't care who ends up as maintainer, but I'm willing to volunteer.  This version of GitPython works with the version of GitDB currently in the ports tree.
